by
    have h₁ : hG.map_eq
    have h₂ : hY.map_eq
    simp_all [map_eq, IsBinomialRandom, HasLaw, binomialRandom]
    <;>
    simp_all [Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
    <;>
    simp_all [Sym2.chooseCorrection]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  aemeasurable := by
    have h₁ : hG.aemeasurable
    have h₂ : hY.aemeasurable
    simp_all [aemeasurable, IsBinomialRandom, HasLaw, Measurable]
    <;>
    aesop

<;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
    rw [h3₃]
    <;>

  rw [h3₂]
  <;>

to

by
    have h₁ : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (σ p) P := hG.compl
    have h₂ : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ q) P := hY.compl
    have h₃ : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ p * σ q) P := h₁.inf h₂
    have h₄ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (G(V, σ p * σ q)) P := h₃.hasLaw
    have h₅ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω)) (G(V, σ <| σ p * σ q)) P := by
      -- The complement of G ⊔ H is (G)ᶜ ⊓ (H)ᶜ
      -- Use the fact that the distribution of (G)ᶜ ⊓ (H)ᶜ is known to get the distribution of G ⊔ H
      have h₆ : (fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω)) = (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) := by
        funext ω
        simp [SimpleGraph.ext_iff, complem, inf_comm]
        <;> tauto
      rw [h₆]
      -- Use the fact that the complement operation is measurable and the distribution of (G)ᶜ ⊓ (H)ᶜ is known
      have h₇ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) (G(V, σ <| σ p * σ q)) P := by
        have h₈ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (G(V, σ p * σ q)) P := h₄
        have h₉ : (G(V, σ p * σ q)).comap (fun G : SimpleGraph V ↦ Gᶜ) = G(V, σ <| σ p * σ q) := by
          simp [binomialRandom, simpleGraph_countable, Set.compl_compl, measure_theory.Iic_Ici]
          <;> rfl
        have h₁₀ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) (G(V, σ <| σ p * σ q)) P := by
          -- The complement of (G)ᶜ ⊓ (H)ᶜ is G ⊔ H
          have h₁₁ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) ((G(V, σ p * σ q)).comap (fun G : SimpleGraph V ↦ Gᶜ)) P := by
            convert h₈.comap (fun G : SimpleGraph V ↦ Gᶜ) using 1
            <;> simp [Function.comp]
          rw [h₉] at h₁₁
          exact h₁₁
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₇
    exact h₅.map
  aemeasurable := by
    -- The union of two measurable sets is measurable
    have h₁ : AEMeasurable δ P := hG.aemeasurable
    have h₂ : AEMeasurable δ' P := hY.aemeasurable
    have h₃ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω).edgeSet) P := by
      -- The union of two measurable sets is measurable
      have h₄ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet) P := hG.aemeasurable_edgeSet
      have h₅ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (H ω).edgeSet) P := hY.aemeasurable_edgeSet
      have h₆ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet ∪ (H ω).edgeSet) P := by
        -- The union of two measurable sets is measurable
        have h₇ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet) P := hG.aemeasurable_edgeSet
        have h₈ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (H ω).edgeSet) P := hY.aemeasurable_edgeSet
        have h₉ : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet ∪ (H ω).edgeSet) P := h₇.mono (by
          aesop) |>.union h₈.mono (by aesop)
        exact h₉
      have h₇ : (fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω).edgeSet) = (fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet ∪ (H ω).edgeSet) := by
        funext ω
        simp [SimpleGraph.edgeSet_sup]
      rw [h₇]
      exact h₆
    exact h₃

)) P where
  map_eq := sorry
by sorry

by
    have h₁ : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) (σ <| σ p * σ q) P := by sorry
    exact h₁.map
  aemeasurable := by
    have h₁ : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) (σ <| σ p * σ q) P := by sorry
    exact h₁.aemeasurable
by rfl
